title: CONNAISSANCES AGRICOLES : RELIER LES AGRICULTEURS, LES CONSEILLERS ET LES CHERCHEURS POUR STIMULER L'INNOVATION
subtitle: Impliquer les parties prenantes dans les laboratoires vivants
description: A practice summary on engaging stakeholders in living labs to co-create innovative agricultural advisory services. It outlines steps for stakeholder analysis, meaningful involvement, and the use of system diagrams and regular dialogue to ensure effective implementation.
